questions.prompt: Panoramic imaging showing a corticated radiolucency hugging an impacted third molar crown most strongly suggests:

options.text: Dentigerous cyst associated with the impacted crown

questions.prompt: Vitality testing helps separate inflammatory radicular disease from many:

options.text: Developmental dentigerous lesions tied to vital impacted teeth
OKC cases requiring pulp extirpation only

questions.prompt: Before definitive diagnosis, biopsy correlation with imaging is emphasized because:

options.text: Radiographs alone always distinguish every odontogenic lesion
Overlapping radiolucent patterns require histopathology for specificity
MRI replaces biopsy for all jaw cysts
Clinical exam negates need for tissue sampling
